title: Vanilla Connected Glass
description: Connected Glass that does not require OptiFine and works with any resource pack!
body:
![Vanilla Connected Glass](https://i.postimg.cc/yNzy4HBt/vcg.png)
![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/CUC4h0GP?label=Downloads)\
Vanilla Connected Glass makes glass blocks and panes connect seamlessly — no OptiFine or Continuity required! It’s fully compatible with all resource packs, using only vanilla cullfacing methods to hide faces when a block is to the left, right, above, or below.

Each glass model includes thin cuboids around the borders, textured with glass edges, creating a smooth connected effect. Diagonal pixels are handled with a few extra cubes to keep everything aligned perfectly.

### ✨ Features:

- Works with glass blocks and glass panes
- Supports all glass colours
- No OptiFine or mods required
- Fully compatible with any resource pack (place your pack above this one from version 0.8 onward)
- Clean connected edges using vanilla-only mechanics
- Lightweight and easy to install

### ⚠️ Because this method relies purely on vanilla cullfacing:

- Borders may be visible from inside the glass
- Glass will connect to any block, not just other glass (excluding blocks like leaves, iron bars, etc.)

While there are a few minor limitations, the pack remains 100% vanilla-friendly and perfect for creators or players seeking connected glass without mods.

Note: I know OptiFine and Continuity glass can look smoother, but this is the only way to achieve vanilla-connected glass. If you know a better method, I’d love to hear it! =D\
![Vanilla Connected Glass](https://i.postimg.cc/QNT7QjBh/117237de1a4477533fcfa18e77ddf6dbcd849f02-350.webp)

💡 If you like this, check out my other pack:
[Vanilla Connected Textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-connected-textures)

🔒 Official downloads are available only on Modrinth, CurseForge, and Planet Minecraft under the name sniffercraft34. Anything else may be modified or unsafe.
